# Sprint 0.2 Data Ingestion Framework

**Sprint:** Sprint 0. Platform Foundation
**Objective:** Establish the foundation for the analytics platform, including Snowflake setup and initial data ingestion.

## Description
Design and implement the data ingestion framework, including CDC-enabled pipelines and batch ingestion for sources without CDC support.

## Deliverable
Data ingestion framework design and implementation
